subcodes.first_line: O thou who art beset by a hundred thousand difficulties, God hath made thee a wanderer from Tehran that thou mayest taste the bitterness of exile [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مبتلای صد هزار مشکلات خداوند ترا از طهران آواره بوینه نمود که تلخی غربت
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
